title: Merkle: HashCommand
description: CLI entry point for spex hash. Parses flags, wires Hasher and TreeBuilder to compute the merkle tree, SnapshotStore to save it.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#27. All review feedback addressed.

title: Merkle: Hasher
description: Computes SHA-256 hashes for individual files (leaf nodes) and for sorted child hash lists (interior nodes).
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#11. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: IDValidator
description: Checks ID uniqueness within each array and validates all cross-reference targets exist.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#18. All review feedback addressed.

title: Merkle: TreeBuilder
description: Builds the merkle tree by walking the spec directory structure. Maps spec hierarchy to tree nodes.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#12. All review feedback addressed.

title: Map: MapCommand
description: CLI entry point for spex map get, spex map list, and spex check. Wires MappingStore and PreflightChecker, outputs structured JSON to stdout, exits 0/1.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#55. All review feedback addressed.

title: Schema: ModuleSchema
description: Add test_sections array definition to module.schema.json (id, name, content path, describes component IDs).

title: Render: RenderCommand
description: CLI entry point for spex render. Parses format flag (markdown/dot/json), wires SpecReader with selected renderer, outputs to stdout.

title: Schema: ProjectSchema
description: Add test_plan object with scenarios array to project.schema.json.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#46. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: ErrorReporter
description: Aggregates validation errors from all checkers and formats them as structured JSON for output.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#23. All review feedback addressed.

title: Impact: ReportGenerator
description: Produces the structured JSON impact report from classified actions, grouping by action type with summary counts. Implements FR4 (Output impact report).
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#36. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: ContentResolver
description: Walks all content paths in module.json files and verifies the referenced markdown files exist.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#17. All review feedback addressed.

title: Apply: SnapshotSaver
description: Saves the new merkle snapshot after all bead actions are complete.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#25. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: ContentResolver
description: Update ContentResolver to also walk test_sections content paths for validation.

title: Apply: BeadCloser
description: Update BeadCloser to remove mapping records from .bead-map.json on bead close. Uses map.Store interface.

title: Merkle: ImpactClassifier
description: Analyzes diff results to classify changes by their impact level: impl-only, arch+impl, or structural.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#24. All review feedback addressed.

title: Merkle: DiffEngine
description: Switch DiffEngine from path-based to spec-ID-based diffing. Compares IDs between current tree and snapshot.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#52. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: TestCoverageChecker
description: New TestCoverageChecker component — verify every component has at least one test_section describing it. Plug into existing validation pipeline.

title: Impact: BeadReader
description: Update BeadReader to extract spex:<record-id> labels instead of parsing multi-label format.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#49. All review feedback addressed.

title: Map: MappingStore
description: CRUD for .bead-map.json. Each record links a spec node ID to a bead ID with module, component, content path, and spec hash. Atomic file writes, referential uniqueness enforced, concurrent-safe.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#45. All review feedback addressed.

title: Apply: BeadUpdater
description: Update BeadUpdater to update spec_hash in mapping records when spec content changes. Uses map.Store interface.

title: Validator: ValidateCommand
description: CLI entry point for spex validate. Parses flags, wires all checkers through ErrorReporter, exits 0/1.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#39. All review feedback addressed.

title: CLI: RootCommand
description: Cobra-based root command for spex. Register all module subcommands, global --spec-dir flag, auto-generated help, shell completions. Replaces switch-case dispatch in main.go.

title: Merkle: DiffEngine
description: Compares two hash trees (current vs snapshot) and identifies changed nodes at every level.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#14. All review feedback addressed.

title: CLI: VersionCommand
description: Version subcommand printing version, commit hash, build date, Go version. Three variables injected via ldflags with dev/unknown defaults.

title: Validator: DAGChecker
description: Builds dependency graphs from module, requirement, and component references, then checks for cycles.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#15. All review feedback addressed.

title: Impact: ActionClassifier
description: Determines the action (create/close/review) for each matched or unmatched spec node according to the decision table. Implements FR3 (Classify actions).
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#34. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: NameConsistencyChecker
description: Validate that module names in project.json match the corresponding module.json name field exactly. Report mismatches with both values, use case-insensitive comparison to detect likely matches and suggest fixes. Lowercase convention enforced.

title: Merkle: ImpactClassifier
description: Switch ImpactClassifier to use node metadata instead of path parsing for impact classification.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#54. All review feedback addressed.

title: Impact: NodeMatcher
description: Update NodeMatcher to match spec node IDs directly via mapping records instead of path-based string manipulation. Three-way classification: matched/unmatched/orphaned.

title: Impact: ImpactCommand
description: CLI entry point for spex impact. Reads merkle diff, wires BeadReader, NodeMatcher, ActionClassifier, ReportGenerator, outputs impact report as JSON.
close_reason: done

title: Apply: BeadCloser
description: Closes obsolete beads via the bd CLI with a reason derived from the impact report.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#20. All review feedback addressed.

title: Map: PreflightChecker
description: Deterministic preflight for implement and review skills. Resolves bead ID to mapping record, walks spec dependency graph transitively, reports ready/blocked/stale status with blocker details.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#51. All review feedback addressed.

title: Write /spec skill
description:
Create skills/spec/SKILL.md. Reads proposal from spec/proposals/, creates/modifies spec JSON + md files following the schema. Detects new project (no project.json) vs new module vs alter mode. Calls spex validate after edits once available. This is the LLM interface for spec authoring.

Interface mapping: The schema has no explicit interface node type. When migrating legacy specs that have an Interfaces section (e.g. Python DSL, C ABI, Serialization, Data Loaders, Visualization, Export), model behavioral contracts (C ABI, Serialization) as functional requirements and structural interfaces (Data Loaders, Visualization, Export) as components.
close_reason: done

title: Define spec JSON schema (project.json + module.json)
description: Write JSON Schema documents for project.json and module.json. Node types: requirement, component, impl_section, data_flow, milestone, module. Edge types: implements, uses, described_in, depends_on, groups, requires_module. All IDs numeric within type. Content paths to markdown. This schema is the foundation everything else validates against.
close_reason: Closed

title: Merkle: DiffCommand
description: CLI entry point for spex diff. Compares current merkle tree against stored snapshot via DiffEngine, classifies impact via ImpactClassifier.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#28. All review feedback addressed.

title: Proposal: ProposalCommands
description: CLI entry points for spex register, spex log, and spex template. Wires Registrar, HistoryViewer, TemplateProvider into subcommands.

title: Write /propose skill
description: Create skills/propose/SKILL.md. Free-form conversation -> structured proposal.md. Detects type: project proposal (no project.json) vs change proposal. Writes to spec/proposals/YYYY-MM-DD-name.md. Calls spex register once available.
close_reason: Closed

title: Apply: ProposalTagger
description: Tags all affected beads with the proposal reference that triggered the changes.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#22. All review feedback addressed.

title: Merkle: SnapshotStore
description: Reads and writes snapshot files. Serializes the hash tree to a JSON file for git storage.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#13. All review feedback addressed.

title: Impact: NodeMatcher
description: Matches changed spec nodes to beads by comparing spec paths and metadata fields. Correlates classified changes with existing beads using module, component, and impl_section indices. Implements FR2 (Match changed nodes to beads) and NFR5 (Deterministic matching).
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#33. All review feedback addressed.

title: Apply: BeadUpdater
description: Updates bead metadata to reflect modified spec nodes.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#21. All review feedback addressed.

title: Merkle: TreeBuilder
description: Switch TreeBuilder from path-based to spec-ID-based keying. Nodes keyed by module/<id>/component/<id> instead of file paths.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#48. All review feedback addressed.

title: Apply: BeadCreator
description: Update BeadCreator to create mapping records in .bead-map.json and set spex:<record-id> labels after bead creation. Uses map.Store interface.

title: Impact: BeadReader
description: Reads bead metadata from the br CLI, extracting spec-related fields (module, component, impl_section, spec_hash) for matching. Implements FR1 (Read bead metadata).
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#32. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: SchemaChecker
description: Validates project.json and module.json against embedded JSON Schemas using a JSON Schema validation library.
close_reason: SchemaChecker implemented and reviewed in PR#9. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: OrphanDetector
description: Analyzes reference coverage to find requirements not implemented by any component and components not described by any impl_section.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#16. All review feedback addressed.

title: Apply: BeadCreator
description: Creates new beads via the bd CLI with spec metadata attached.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#19. All review feedback addressed.

title: Apply: ApplyCommand
description: CLI entry point for spex apply. Reads impact report, wires BeadCreator, BeadCloser, BeadUpdater, ProposalTagger, SnapshotSaver, executes all bead actions.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#42. All review feedback addressed.

title: Merkle: SnapshotStore
description: Switch SnapshotStore from path-based to spec-ID-based keying. Snapshot becomes flat ID-to-metadata map.
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#50. All review feedback addressed.
